description_long: This object is a plush stuffed toy modeled after a red panda, featuring a rounded body covered in soft, reddish-brown fabric with darker limbs and a long, bushy tail. The head is detailed with white markings around the eyes and snout, black-tipped ears, and a gentle, friendly facial expression. The toy's legs are short and slightly bent, giving it a lifelike, playful stance. The surface appears velvety and matte, typical of high-quality plush toys, and the seams are subtly integrated into the design. The eyes are likely made of plastic or embroidered, adding a touch of realism and charm. This toy is designed to be cuddly and appealing, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban homes or parks.
description: A soft, plush red panda stuffed toy with reddish-brown fur, white facial markings, and a bushy tail. It has a friendly face and a lifelike, playful stance.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the broad back, rounded head, and the full length of the bushy tail, with both ears visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the elongated body, bushy tail, and the white facial markings, with all four legs visible.
description_view_2: The front view displays the red panda's face with white markings, black-tipped ears, and both front legs, emphasizing its friendly expression.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the body profile, tail, and facial features, with the right legs in focus.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is gentle and neutral, with wide, round eyes and a small, closed mouth that gives a friendly and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head slightly raised and the tail extended behind, giving a lifelike and alert posture.
